nasb.text: Whenever the unclean spirits saw Him, they would fall down before Him and shout, “You are the Son of God!”

esv.text: And whenever the unclean spirits saw him, they fell down before him and cried out, “You are the Son of God.”

cnv.text: 污靈每次看到他，就仆倒在他面前，大聲喊叫說：“你是　神的兒子！”

ccb.text: 每当污鬼看见祂，就俯伏在祂面前，大喊：“你是上帝的儿子！”

csbs.text: 污灵每当见到耶稣，就俯伏在他面前，喊叫说：“你是神的儿子！”
